title: Open Bugs
main_idea: Bugs to loop through and fix one at a time. we only need to consume these on at a time.
reason: Can't have bugs! Tracking here makes it easy to go through them as they come up.

issues: parseing of apostrophe seems to have messed up, this statement showed a hexcode for the apostrophe, need to handle the parseing for this case:  <speak>Poke! Mission accomplished. Every sprite in Overseer now has a name and the AI knows exactly who it's playing!</speak>

issues.description: the 'MAIN' badge appears even when no session is open.  It should not.

I often see this in the terminals input field when reopening the app.  some number of this repeating sequence: rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a1;2c11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb:0a0a/0a0a/0a0a11;rgb

For gemini, the way we're doing system prompt injection, it auto submits and awaits an answer. If there is anyway we can NOT have a submission up front, or at the very least somehow watch for our system prompt to appear on screen, and as soon as it does, send a ctrl c message to kill the query, that would be nice.  but if we can research a better way of sending it without initializing an initial query, that would be best
